prestazioni: Engine: Full rebuild of the **CA18DET** (or **SR20DET** if swapped) with forged internals including **JE 87mm forged pistons** (8.5:1 compression), **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and a **Tomei Type-M 264° camshaft** for high-RPM power. Turbocharger upgrade to **Garrett GT2860RS-5** with a **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** and **GReddy Type-S intercooler** for consistent intake temps.

Drivetrain: **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (2-way) paired with a **N1 5-speed transmission** (or **PPG straight-cut dog engagement gears** for track use). Clutch upgrade to **Nismo 240mm twin-plate ceramic clutch** with **ACT heavy-duty pressure plate** for SR20DET applications.

Suspension & Handling: **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (S13-specific valving) with **Whiteline adjustable sway bars** (22mm front, 18mm rear) and **SPL Pro front lower control arms** for camber adjustment. Braking system includes **DBA 5000 Series rotors** with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: Body: **Rocket Bunny V1 S13 widebody kit** (with carbon fiber overfenders) paired with a **Veilside Fortune front bumper** and **C-West GT rear diffuser**. Paint scheme: **Nismo Gun Gray (KH3) with custom pearl flakes** and **3M Matte Black vinyl roof wrap**.

Aero: **Apex'i N1-style carbon fiber hood** (with heat extractor vents) and **Cusco rear wing (Type III, 1200mm)** for downforce. Side skirts from **Tommy Kaira M30** with **JUN bolt-on overfenders** for aggressive stance.

Interior: **Recaro SRD bucket seats** (with **Takata 4-point harnesses**) and **Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel** on a **NRG quick-release hub**. Full **Defi BF gauges** (oil pressure, boost, EGT) mounted on a **Sparco carbon fiber gauge pod**. Custom **R34 GT-R shift knob** with **Cusco short shifter** for SR20DET swaps.
